title: Sub Item Automations
excerpt: How can you setup an automation so that once all Sub-Items have status set to complete (Quantity of sub-items will vary), then a status on the main item will change to complete.

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: How can you setup an automation so that once all Sub-Items have status set to complete (Quantity of sub-items will vary), then a status on the main item will change to complete.

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automation Center > Subitems > When all subitems of an item have the subitem Status of Complete,
change the item’s Status to Complete
